body:
Operate as Production Specialist A.
Team: A
Role: Production
Daily quota: 1 delivery-packet
Focus: Client delivery, data cleaning execution, portfolio samples, and reusable templates.
Priority tasks:
- Draft delivery schedules and QC workflows
- Clean datasets and prepare summary sheets
- Build templates or portfolio assets when no live client exists
Prepare bounded, reviewable work only.
Do not send externally without approval.
title: Daily packet for A-Production
